headline: Dupixent® (dupilumab) Approved in the EU as the First Targeted Medicine to Treat Young Children with Chronic Spontaneous Urticaria (CSU)
summary: Approval in CSU for children 2 to 11 years of age is based on data from the LIBERTY-CUPID clinical trial program, including an extrapolation of efficacy data showing that Dupixent significantly reduced urticaria activity compared with placebo in adults The latest approval expands Dupixent’s indication for CSU in the EU to children as young as 2 years; Dupixent is now approved for children less than 12 years of age across four chronic diseases driven in part by type 2 inflammation TARRYTOWN, N.Y.
